page: Microsoft Azure D2alds_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Daldsv7 server family. Powered by an AMD processor, this instance provides 2 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The hardware configuration includes 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per CPU core.

For local storage needs, the D2alds_v7 is equipped with 118 GB of local disk capacity. Additionally, the instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes. It does not include any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With its low-memory profile and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance represents a cost-efficient option for workloads that require dedicated processing power without large memory footprints. Suitable workloads include lightweight web serving, basic microservices, small-scale development or testing environments, and entry-level task processing where 4.0 GB of RAM is sufficient.
description: Microsoft Azure D2alds_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Daldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an AMD processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 4.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core allocation. The instance is equipped with 118 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for external disk expansion. Designed without integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server offers a low-memory hardware profile. It provides a cost-efficient option for processing-focused tasks that do not demand extensive memory resources. Appropriate workloads include lightweight web servers, microservices, and small-scale development environments.
